entry.title: New IDC HT940216D0001 awarded to UNITED CONCORDIA COMPANIES, INC. for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
IGF::OT::IGF
THE TRICARE DENTAL PROGRAM (TDP) OFFERS WORLDWIDE COVERAGE TO ALL ELIGIBLE FAMILY MEMBERS OF UNIFORMED SERVICE ACTIVE DUTY PERSONNEL AND TO MEMBERS OF THE SELECTED RESERVE AND INDIVIDUAL READY RESERVE (IRR) AND THEIR ELIGIBLE FAMILY MEMBERS.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: DIRECT HEALTH AND MEDICAL INSURANCE CARRIERS

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HT940216D0001 (P00001) awarded to UNITED CONCORDIA COMPANIES, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
IGF::OT::IGF
THE TRICARE DENTAL PROGRAM (TDP) OFFERS WORLDWIDE COVERAGE TO ALL ELIGIBLE FAMILY MEMBERS OF UNIFORMED SERVICE ACTIVE DUTY PERSONNEL AND TO MEMBERS OF THE SELECTED RESERVE AND INDIVIDUAL READY RESERVE (IRR) AND THEIR ELIGIBLE FAMILY MEMBERS.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: DIRECT HEALTH AND MEDICAL INSURANCE CARRIERS

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
